workaround: Increase Docker container memory limit to {new_limit}MB in docker-compose.yml. Reduce concurrent stress threads from 16 to 8.
resolution: Container resource limits updated in test infrastructure. Baseline memory profiled and limits set to peak+20% headroom.

summary: REST API returns 500 error on volume clone operation

workaround: Add retry logic with exponential backoff (max 3 retries, 5s base delay) to clone API calls. Avoid parallel clone operations on same volume.
resolution: Database connection pool exhaustion during bulk clone operations. Pool size increased from 20 to 50 connections in 3.5.2.

summary: Data Reduction ratio drops to 1.0x unexpectedly on powerstore-lab-01

resolution: Policy engine updated to support inline dedup with AES-256 encryption in 3.5.2. No workaround needed post-patch.

resolution: Test framework updated with proper async state polling. All volume operation tests now use wait_for_stable_state() helper.

summary: FC HBA path failover takes 163s instead of expected 30s
description: Fibre Channel path failover on vmware-integration-env between primary and secondary HBA ports is taking 149 seconds, well above the 30-second target. Host I/O is paused for the entire duration. Observed with QLE2692 HBA model.

workaround: Reduce HBA RSCN delay timer to 100ms. Set fast_io_fail_tmo=5 and dev_loss_tmo=10 in HBA driver parameters.
resolution: HBA driver update resolves delayed LOGO/PLOGI exchange during failover. Update driver to 4.0.2.
